canonical_truth.summary: A woodpecker works a dead branch with metronomic exactness — same interval, same angle, no wasted motion; nothing organic moves like that.
canonical_truth.concrete_outcome: YY encounters a creature behaving with non-organic consistency; the rhythm raises a question that doesn't resolve before the woodpecker stops

perception_prompt.noticeable_surface: a woodpecker working a dead branch with metronomic exactness — same interval, same angle, no wasted motion; nothing organic moves like that

authorial_note.real_world_inspiration: AI robot 'Ace' beats elite table tennis players — autonomous 8-joint robot learns human movement patterns and wins 3 of 5 matches with machine precision
authorial_note.translation_logic: the robot's uncanny mechanical regularity translates to a creature exhibiting non-organic consistency; YY can encounter the rhythm physically and feel the wrongness of its perfection
authorial_note.restraint_reason: the event enters as sensory encounter, not announcement; no mention of technology or abstraction — only what YY can hear and see
